---
title: "Compare Provinces"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.4/dist/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<script src="https://unpkg.com/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>

<div style="text-align:center;margin:1.5rem 0;">
  <label for="compareYear" style="font-weight:bold;font-size:1.2rem;">Year: </label>
  <select id="compareYear" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;">
    <option value="1881">1881</option>
    <option value="1911">1911</option>
    <option value="1921">1921</option>
    <option value="1931">1931</option>
  </select>
</div>

<div style="display:flex;gap:2rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:1rem 0;">
  <!-- Province A -->
  <div style="flex:1;max-width:550px;min-width:350px;">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:1rem;">
      <label for="provA" style="font-weight:bold;">Province A: </label>
      <select id="provA" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;width:250px;"></select>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;padding:1rem;">
      <h4 id="nameA" style="margin-top:0;text-align:center;"></h4>
      <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.9rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Total population</td><td id="totalA" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Child/Woman Ratio (‰)</td><td id="cwrA" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Old-age dependency (%)</td><td id="oldDepA" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Structural dependency (%)</td><td id="structDepA" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Mean age (years)</td><td id="meanAgeA" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      </table>
      <canvas id="pyramidA"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Province B -->
  <div style="flex:1;max-width:550px;min-width:350px;">
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:1rem;">
      <label for="provB" style="font-weight:bold;">Province B: </label>
      <select id="provB" style="padding:4px 8px;font-size:1rem;width:250px;"></select>
    </div>
    <div style="background:#f8f9fa;border-radius:4px;padding:1rem;">
      <h4 id="nameB" style="margin-top:0;text-align:center;"></h4>
      <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.9rem;margin-bottom:0.5rem;">
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Total population</td><td id="totalB" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Child/Woman Ratio (‰)</td><td id="cwrB" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Old-age dependency (%)</td><td id="oldDepB" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #eee;"><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Structural dependency (%)</td><td id="structDepB" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
        <tr><td style="padding:3px 4px;">Mean age (years)</td><td id="meanAgeB" style="text-align:right;padding:3px 4px;font-weight:bold;"></td></tr>
      </table>
      <canvas id="pyramidB"></canvas>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const AGE_GROUPS = [
  {label: '0', col: '0'}, {label: '1–4', col: '1_4'}, {label: '5–9', col: '5_9'},
  {label: '10–14', col: '10_14'}, {label: '15–19', col: '15_19'}, {label: '20–24', col: '20_24'},
  {label: '25–29', col: '25_29'}, {label: '30–34', col: '30_34'}, {label: '35–39', col: '35_39'},
  {label: '40–44', col: '40_44'}, {label: '45–49', col: '45_49'}, {label: '50–54', col: '50_54'},
  {label: '55–59', col: '55_59'}, {label: '60–64', col: '60_64'}, {label: '65–69', col: '65_69'},
  {label: '70–74', col: '70_74'}, {label: '75–79', col: '75_79'}, {label: '80–84', col: '80_84'},
  {label: '85+', col: '85plus'},
];

let censusCache = {};
let chartA = null;
let chartB = null;

function fmt(n) { return Number(n).toLocaleString('en-US'); }

async function loadCensus(year) {
  if (censusCache[year]) return censusCache[year];
  const resp = await fetch('data/census/census_' + year + '.csv');
  const text = await resp.text();
  const parsed = Papa.parse(text, { header: true, skipEmptyLines: true, dynamicTyping: true });
  const byCode = {};
  parsed.data.forEach(function(row) {
    const entry = { den_prov: row.DEN_PROV, cod: parseInt(row.COD_PROV) };
    Object.keys(row).forEach(function(key) {
      if (key !== 'DEN_PROV' && key !== 'COD_PROV') {
        entry[key] = parseFloat(row[key]) || 0;
      }
    });
    byCode[parseInt(row.COD_PROV)] = entry;
  });
  censusCache[year] = byCode;
  return byCode;
}

function populateDropdowns(data) {
  const selectA = document.getElementById('provA');
  const selectB = document.getElementById('provB');
  selectA.innerHTML = '';
  selectB.innerHTML = '';

  const sorted = Object.entries(data).sort((a, b) => a[1].den_prov.localeCompare(b[1].den_prov));
  sorted.forEach(function([cod, prov]) {
    const optA = document.createElement('option');
    optA.value = cod;
    optA.textContent = prov.den_prov;
    selectA.appendChild(optA);

    const optB = document.createElement('option');
    optB.value = cod;
    optB.textContent = prov.den_prov;
    selectB.appendChild(optB);
  });

  // Default: select first and second province
  if (sorted.length >= 2) {
    selectA.value = sorted[0][0];
    selectB.value = sorted[1][0];
  }
}

function drawPyramid(canvasId, prov, name, year, existingChart) {
  const ctx = document.getElementById(canvasId).getContext('2d');
  if (existingChart) existingChart.destroy();

  const reversed = [...AGE_GROUPS].reverse();
  const labels = reversed.map(ag => ag.label);
  const maleData = reversed.map(ag => -(prov['m_' + ag.col] || 0));
  const femaleData = reversed.map(ag => prov['f_' + ag.col] || 0);
  const maxVal = Math.max(Math.max(...maleData.map(Math.abs)), Math.max(...femaleData));

  return new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'bar',
    data: {
      labels: labels,
      datasets: [
        {
          label: 'Male',
          data: maleData,
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(30, 64, 175, 0.85)',
          borderColor: 'rgba(30, 64, 175, 1)',
          borderWidth: 0,
          borderRadius: 2
        },
        {
          label: 'Female',
          data: femaleData,
          backgroundColor: 'rgba(190, 24, 93, 0.85)',
          borderColor: 'rgba(190, 24, 93, 1)',
          borderWidth: 0,
          borderRadius: 2
        }
      ]
    },
    options: {
      indexAxis: 'y',
      responsive: true,
      maintainAspectRatio: true,
      plugins: {
        title: {
          display: true,
          text: name + ' — ' + year,
          font: { size: 13 }
        },
        tooltip: {
          callbacks: {
            label: function(context) {
              return context.dataset.label + ': ' + Math.abs(context.raw).toLocaleString('en-US');
            }
          }
        }
      },
      scales: {
        x: {
          stacked: true,
          ticks: {
            callback: function(value) {
              return Math.abs(value).toLocaleString('en-US');
            }
          },
          suggestedMin: -maxVal * 1.1,
          suggestedMax: maxVal * 1.1
        },
        y: {
          stacked: true
        }
      }
    }
  });
}

function fillPanel(suffix, prov) {
  document.getElementById('name' + suffix).textContent = prov.den_prov;
  document.getElementById('total' + suffix).textContent = fmt(prov.total_pop);
  document.getElementById('cwr' + suffix).textContent = prov.cwr || 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('oldDep' + suffix).textContent = prov.old_dep || 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('structDep' + suffix).textContent = prov.struct_dep || 'N/A';
  document.getElementById('meanAge' + suffix).textContent = prov.mean_age || 'N/A';
}

async function updateComparison() {
  const year = parseInt(document.getElementById('compareYear').value);
  const data = await loadCensus(year);

  populateDropdowns(data);
  updatePanels();
}

function updatePanels() {
  const year = parseInt(document.getElementById('compareYear').value);
  const data = censusCache[year];
  if (!data) return;

  const codA = parseInt(document.getElementById('provA').value);
  const codB = parseInt(document.getElementById('provB').value);
  const provA = data[codA];
  const provB = data[codB];

  if (provA) {
    fillPanel('A', provA);
    chartA = drawPyramid('pyramidA', provA, provA.den_prov, year, chartA);
  }
  if (provB) {
    fillPanel('B', provB);
    chartB = drawPyramid('pyramidB', provB, provB.den_prov, year, chartB);
  }
}

document.getElementById('compareYear').addEventListener('change', updateComparison);
document.getElementById('provA').addEventListener('change', updatePanels);
document.getElementById('provB').addEventListener('change', updatePanels);

updateComparison();
</script>
```
